_meta.description: Sample systems positioned on Ch1's workflow-agent spectrum by their three agency dimensions (autonomy / action / authority) plus path determinism. Fictional AWS account 123456789012.
_meta.source: Agentic GraphRAG Ch1 — Classifying Agentic Systems: The Workflow-Agent Spectrum + the three dimensions of agency

systems.name: faq-generator
systems.note: Chapter workflow example: receives support text, emits an FAQ on a fixed path.

systems.name: market-commentary-report
systems.note: Chapter blended example: LLM retrieves/analyzes/submits; humans review compliance and submit to regulators.

systems.name: devops-investigation-agent
systems.note: Autonomous DevOps agent: given a latency incident it determines the investigation path, calls tools, and remediates within bounds.

systems.name: latency-advisor
systems.note: Read-only diagnostic: high autonomy in reasoning but cannot act on the environment — an advisor, not an agent.
